title: PANW IoT ServiceNow Tickets Check
content:
This playbook should be used in a recurring Job to check the ServiceNow ticket status for the Palo Alto Networks IoT (previously Zingbox) alerts or vulnerabilties.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (PaloAltoNetworks_IoT, xsoar-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: iot-security-check-servicenow.
